package.name: argus_health
package.description: ARGUS VIO health monitor. A standalone watchdog that derives an argus_msgs/VIOHealth report from the live VINS-Fusion /argus/vio/* topics (point-cloud size = inlier proxy, IMU-vs-optimized divergence = drift, IMU variance + VIO speed = excitation) and publishes a recovery signal that holds the drone when tracking is LOST -- e.g. when the Zone-B lights go out (Scenario D). Does not patch or rebuild VINS; observes its public topics only. Provides the ablation C3 "+recovery" behaviour over the C1 KLT baseline.
